description: Validate the steward fails safe when delegated execution support or artifact routing is unavailable.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::virtual_tools::tests::test_try_handle_virtual_tool_call_invoke_delegated_skill_rejects_when_runtime_support_is_disabled --lib -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::child_agents::tests::spawn_child_runtime_rejects_artifact_handle_without_runtime_binding --lib -- --exact
assertions: delegated invocation returns an unavailable status instead of silently spawning
artifact routing stays blocked until runtime bindings exist
steward orchestration fails safe at unsupported boundaries
